control_surface.detail: Reasoning SFT keeps assumptions, uncertainty, and normative-versus-inference separation explicit instead of deleting them during style shaping.

style_coverage.detail: Style `assumptions_then_mechanism_concrete` preserves one valid assumptions_then_mechanism / premises_then_conclusion / concrete reasoning narration path inside the bounded SFT lane.
Style `answer_then_evidence_hybrid` preserves one valid answer_then_evidence / conclusion_then_premises / hybrid reasoning narration path inside the bounded SFT lane.
Style `constraints_then_tradeoffs_conceptual` preserves one valid constraints_then_tradeoffs / top_down_then_concrete / conceptual reasoning narration path inside the bounded SFT lane.

summary: The first bounded reasoning-SFT stage preserves explicit assumptions, uncertainty language, and normative-versus-inference separation while keeping three valid style families live in the accepted trace mix.
